india_trends.title: Sun TV slides 5.4% to Rs 572 after DMK loss
india_trends.summary: Sun TV is part of the Sun Group, controlled by Kalanithi Maran, a relative of Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin, who also heads the DMK. The stock had dropped as much as 9.5% earlier in the session, hitting an intraday low of ₹547.55 on BSE.
